Operation 'initiatePayment' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, missing_context. Original description lacks critical details about expected inputs (amount in paise, merchantId, etc.), output structure, and side effects (transaction creation). Added specifics about Base64 encoding context, input parameters from PaymentInitRequest schema, response content, and state changes for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Initiate a payment transaction. The request body must be Base64 encoded.
data.summary_suggestion: Initiate a payment transaction via PhonePe
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a payment transaction through the PhonePe gateway. The request body must be Base64 encoded. Expects merchantId, merchantTransactionId, amount (in paise), and redirectUrl in the payload. Returns a payment initiation response with a redirect URL for the user to complete payment. The transaction state is created and awaits user action on the PhonePe platform.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about expected inputs (amount in paise, merchantId, etc.), output structure, and side effects (transaction creation). Added specifics about Base64 encoding context, input parameters from PaymentInitRequest schema, response content, and state changes for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'checkPaymentStatus' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is adequate but description needs clarification on what parameters are required (merchantId, merchantTransactionId), what the X-VERIFY header is (security verification), what information is returned, and the typical use case (post-redirect verification). This helps AI agents understand when to call this operation.

data.current_description: Check the status of a payment transaction. X-VERIFY header required.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current status of a payment transaction using merchantId and merchantTransactionId. Requires X-VERIFY header (SHA256-based verification). Returns payment status details including transaction state, amount, and timestamp. Use this to verify payment completion or failure after user redirects back from PhonePe.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description needs clarification on what parameters are required (merchantId, merchantTransactionId), what the X-VERIFY header is (security verification), what information is returned, and the typical use case (post-redirect verification). This helps AI agents understand when to call this operation.

message: Operation 'initiateRefund' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal. Added details about required input parameters (from RefundRequest schema), expected output structure, and side effects (refund queuing and processing). Clarified that partial refunds are supported and funds are credited to original method, helping AI agents understand refund mechanics.

data.current_description: Initiate a refund for a completed payment
data.summary_suggestion: Initiate a refund for completed payment
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a refund for a previously completed payment transaction. Requires merchantId, originalTransactionId, amount (in paise), and merchantTransactionId in the request. Returns a refund response with refund transaction ID and status. The refund is queued for processing and will be credited to the original payment method. Partial refunds are supported.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added details about required input parameters (from RefundRequest schema), expected output structure, and side effects (refund queuing and processing). Clarified that partial refunds are supported and funds are credited to original method, helping AI agents understand refund mechanics.

data.summary_suggestion: Check transaction status via v3 endpoint
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves transaction status using the legacy v3 API endpoint. Accepts merchantId and transactionId as path parameters. Requires X-VERIFY header for authentication. Returns V3StatusResponse with transaction state and details. This endpoint is maintained for backward compatibility; prefer /pg/v1/status for new integrations.

data.current_description: Validate a UPI Virtual Payment Address
data.description_suggestion: Validates a UPI Virtual Payment Address (VPA/UPI ID) for correctness and availability. Accepts a VPA string in the request body. Returns validation result indicating whether the VPA is valid and active. Use this to verify UPI IDs before initiating UPI-based payments to reduce transaction failures.
